description.plain: White ProAddiction Straightening System (Multi Protein) The White ProAddiction USA Multi Protein Straightening System is a revolutionary product that transforms hair at the molecular level, providing unparalleled control, luxurious smoothness, and enduring results. Versatile and safe, ProAddiction caters to all styling preferences, from straight elegance to defined curls, with a quick and easy application. description.plain: Our protein straightening cream contains elastin and collagen. It can repair damaged hair, improve hair environment and quality, soften hair, protect hair cuticles, and make hair soft and shiny. Its use method is very simple: first wash the hair with shampoo, wipe until semi-dry and then use, then evenly apply the product on the hair, calculate the straightening time according to different hair types, healthy hair 20-30 minutes, damaged hair 10-20 minutes, wait until the time is up, rinse with water. After use, it helps to repair damaged hair, make hair natural smooth, enhance hair luster, and form black and beautiful hair.

products.title: Bond Repair Treatment Starter Kit

description.plain: A fast-acting, vegan hair treatment kit that repairs broken bonds in just 10 minutes for all hair types.

unique_selling_points: Patented biodiffusion bond repair technology repairs chemical, mechanical, and environmental damage for hours after application.
metadata.top_features:
Patented biodiffusion bond repair technology: Delivers deep, lasting repair of broken disulfide bonds for restored hair structure
Easy-to-use spray application: Activates in 10 minutes for quick, convenient hair repair
Clinically proven scalp-safe formula: Safe for regular use without irritation
Vegan, biodegradable, and clean ingredients: Suitable for eco-conscious and ingredient-sensitive users
Kit includes concentrate vials and sprayer: Allows for customizable, mess-free application
metadata.tech_specs:
Application Method: Spray
Active Ingredient: Diethylhexyl maleate oleyl alcohol alcohol denat stearamidopropyl dimethylamine
Kit Contents: Empty sprayer bottle, two concentrate vials
Usage Frequency: 1-2 times per week
Suitable Hair Types: All hair types, including damaged, curly, dyed, and treated
Ingredients: 100% vegan, biodegradable

description.plain: Our breakthrough hair treatment delivers deep, lasting bond repair in one simple step. • Easy-to-use spray actively repairs broken disulfide bonds to restore hair's structure in just 10 minutes • Patented formula repairs chemical, mechanical and environmental damage for all hair types and textures • BIODIFFUSION™ bond repair technology continues to repair each strand for hours, even after hair is dry • Clinically proven scalp safe Add it to your hair care routine 1-2 times a week to enjoy softer, stronger, healthier hair.

Our breakthrough hair treatment delivers deep, lasting bond repair in one simple step. • Easy-to-use spray actively repairs broken disulfide bonds to restore hair's structure in just 10 minutes • Patented formula repairs chemical, mechanical and environmental damage for all hair types and textures • BIODIFFUSION™ bond repair technology continues to repair each strand for hours, even after hair is dry • Clinically proven scalp safe Add it to your hair care routine 1-2 times a week to enjoy softer, stronger, healthier hair.

variants.title: epres™ Bond Repair Treatment Starter Kit

description.plain: Softer, stronger and healthier hair doesn't have to be reserved for in the salon. Give your clients professional-quality hair treatment to use at home, to maintain their locks between appointments. Introducing epres™ Bond Repair Treatment: Our breakthrough formula for deep, lasting repair of chemical, thermal and mechanical damage. Our innovative spray-on hair treatment contains an acid-free formula with Biodiffusion™ technology that continues to repair the hair even after it has dried. The epres™ Bond Repair Treatment Starter Kit contains: - 1x epres™ spray bottle for a continuous, fine mist. - 2x epres™ Bond Repair Treatment Refill vials (15ml each) How to use: Step 1 - Spray a generous amount of epres™ Bond Repair Treatment onto dry hair until fully saturated. Step 2 - Leave on hair for 10 minutes or more. The technology continues to work for as long as you have it on your hair. You can even sleep in it for an even deeper treatment! Step 3 - Shampoo, condition and style your hair as usual and enjoy its renewed strength and softeness.

media.alt_text: epres™ Bond Repair Treatment Starter Kit

products.title: Straightening Balm

unique_selling_points: Provides long-lasting, frizz-fighting smoothness and shine without leaving hair stiff or tacky, suitable for all hair types including color-treated and chemically treated hair.
metadata.top_features:
Leaves-in conditioning balm: Delivers smooth, shiny results without the need for heat styling
Fights frizz by sealing the cuticle: Locks out humidity and reduces flyaways for a sleek finish
Hydrates and softens hair: Adds moisture for a soft, moveable feel without stiffness
Safe for color-treated and chemically treated hair: Gentle formula suitable for advanced hair care needs
Works on straight, wavy, and curly hair: Versatile use for various hair types and textures

Product Form: Cream
Finish: Shiny
Key Ingredient: Aloe vera
Net Weight: 6.8 oz
Target Hair Types: Straight, Wavy, Curly
Gender: Unisex

description.plain: Blow-dry cream provides lasting smooth and shiny results with excellent frizz protection. Hair is soft and moveable without a stiff or tacky feeling. Key Benefits Leave-in conditioning benefits Fights frizz by sealing the cuticle and locking out humidity Hydrates, softens and adds shine Ideal For Straight, wavy and curly hair with fine to coarse texture. Always Safe For Color treated, chemically-treated, keratin treated and relaxed hair. How to Use Work balm through towel dried hair. Blow-dry using a round brush for volume or flat brush for smoothing.

description.plain: Do you have these problems with your hair? Protein Correcting Hair Straightening Cream is a lightweight, non-greasy formula designed to smooth and straighten hair while providing essential nutrients. Its unique protein-enriched formula helps to repair and strengthen hair, leaving it soft and manageable. This cream works to protect hair from heat damage while also providing long-lasting straightening. Its blend of natural ingredients helps to nourish and protect hair, leaving it looking and feeling healthy. This cream is perfect for those looking to smooth and straighten their hair without the use of harsh chemicals. Features Gentle & Safe - Protein Correcting hair straightening cream gentle ingredients that won't damage your hair, protect your hair while straightening, use mild ingredients that won't damage your hair. Our Hair Straightening Cream smells fresh and is safe to use. Protein Correcting Hair Straightening Cream - Protein correcting hair straightening cream made with active nourishing ingredients such as citric acid, glycerin, plant extracts. Hair Straightening Cream make frizzy, curly or wavy hair completely straight while maintaining hair health. Suitable for All Hair Types - It is suitable for all hair types, especially for curly and damaged hair, protein hair straightener cream can strengthen hair elasticity and smooth dry hair. Instant Hair Straightening - Without the use of harmful heated hair straightener or expensive salon visits, it is specially formulated for turning thick, curly, and unruly hair into silky straight hair in 10 minutes. Easy to Use: 1. Before use, rinse the hair with shampoo, wipe until half dry, and thoroughly comb it smooth. 2. Apply the product evenly to the hair and calculate the straighten hair time based on different hair types. Healthy hair for 20-30 minutes, damaged hair for 10-20 minutes. 3. Rinse the hair with clean water. Specification Name: Protein Correcting Hair Straightening Cream Content: 60ml/180ml Shelf life: 3 years Efficacy: Improve hair quality, moisturize, and supplement nutrients
